nasb.text: They will take up a lamentation over you and say to you, ‘How you have perished, O inhabited one, From the seas, O renowned city, Which was mighty on the sea, She and her inhabitants, Who imposed her terror On all her inhabitants!

esv.text: And they will raise a lamentation over you and say to you, “‘How you have perished, you who were inhabited from the seas, O city renowned, who was mighty on the sea; she and her inhabitants imposed their terror on all her inhabitants!

cnv.text: 他們必為你作一首哀歌說： 你這著名的城，航海之人的居所， 在海上堅固有力的啊！ 你和你的居民素來使驚恐 臨到所有住在那裡的人身上， 你怎麼絕了跡呢？

ccb.text: 他们必为你唱哀歌说， “‘你这海上众民居住的名城， 向来称雄海上，威震邻邦， 现在怎么被毁灭了呢？
